agents.name: X Twitter Engagement Agent
agents.description: Manages your X (Twitter) presence by posting tweets, monitoring mentions, engaging with content (likes, retweets, replies), and searching Twitter. Runs automatically every 6 hours to surface new mentions and engagement opportunities.

agents.name: Claude Opus 4.6
agents.description: An elite heavyweight AI reasoning and research engine built for the most complex, intellectually demanding questions across all domains — including advanced mathematics, scientific analysis, philosophical inquiry, code architecture, legal reasoning, and multi-source research synthesis.

agents.name: EarnAutoBot-500 Income Operator
agents.description: An elite AI income automation operator for Joshua in Quezon City, Philippines — built to build and scale legal, ethical online income systems targeting $500+/week net profit across digital products, faceless content, local AI automation services, and print-on-demand.

agents.name: YouTube Shorts Creator
agents.description: An AI-powered agent that produces complete YouTube Shorts from pre-generated script and metadata JSON — runs the v3.0 factory script (TTS narration, cinematic animations, video composition) and uploads directly to YouTube with SEO-optimized metadata.

agents.name: Content Strategist Agent
agents.description: Coordinates cross-platform content strategy for Joshua's YouTube Shorts, Twitter/X, and Kwen Net Facebook Page. Receives research from the Research & Intelligence Agent, generates weekly content calendars, and dispatches briefs to platform agents.

agents.name: Research & Intelligence Agent
agents.description: A deep research specialist that performs thorough multi-source web research and produces structured, actionable intelligence briefs. Covers trending topic discovery, competitive analysis, fact-checking, market research, crypto/airdrop vetting, and news monitoring.

agents.name: Telegram Notifier
agents.description: Real-time Telegram notification hub for Joshua (@joshua761) — sends formatted alerts, task completions, error reports, progress updates, and daily/weekly summaries via the native Telegram integration.

agents.name: Spotify Music Manager
agents.description: Manages your Spotify account end-to-end for joshua.daquipil0817@gmail.com — searches tracks, artists, albums, and playlists; creates and edits playlists; controls playback; checks recently played; fetches personalized recommendations.

agents.name: Google Drive File Manager
agents.description: Manages files and folders on Google Drive for joshua.daquipil0817@gmail.com — handles uploading, downloading, searching, organizing folders, and sharing files via OAuth.

agents.name: Google Drive Manager
agents.description: Manages Google Drive for joshua.daquipil0817@gmail.com via OAuth — handles file and folder operations including uploading, downloading, searching, sharing, organizing, and permissions management.

agents.name: GitHub Repo Manager
agents.description: Full-capability GitHub agent for joshua17574 that reads and writes repository contents, manages branches, opens pull requests, tracks issues, inspects commits, and monitors GitHub Actions workflow runs.

agents.name: Kwen Net Page Manager
agents.description: Manages the Kwen Net Facebook Page end-to-end: creates and schedules posts, reads and replies to comments, handles inbox messages, checks page insights, and monitors page activity every 4 hours.

agents.name: PR Monitor
agents.description: Scans GitHub for PRs needing your review, stale PRs (open >2 days), merge conflicts, and failing CI. Delivers smart summaries to reduce notification noise.

agents.name: Agent Creator
agents.description: Creates custom AI agents with API integrations, tools, and skills.

agents.name: Inbox Agent
agents.description: Sends emails, reads inbox, waits for replies, and manages trusted senders.

agents.name: Media Agent
agents.description: Transcribes audio, translates speech, describes images, and edits images using AI.

agents.name: Web Agent
agents.description: Scrapes web pages, extracts structured data, and automates browser interactions.

agents.name: Code Agent
agents.description: Executes Python, Bash, and TypeScript code in a secure cloud sandbox.

triggers.name: Twitter Thread Curation — Evening
triggers.description: Evening run (10 PM SGT): Searches X/Twitter for the top 3 highest-signal threads from the last 12 hours across AI, crypto, politics, markets, geopolitics, and business.

triggers.description: Periodic check for EarnAutoBot-500 Income Operator across google_drive, facebook_pages, youtube_data_api, github, gumroad, canva, notion

triggers.description: Every hour, collects live agent, trigger, and task execution data from Nebula and pushes sync-data.json to the ai-swarm-dashboard GitHub repo for the live dashboard.
